prompt: Chart NVIDIA Corporation's (NVDA) earnings surprises over the last 8 quarters — plot actual EPS vs estimated EPS as two lines over the 8 report dates, with the surprise delta (actualEarningResult minus epsEstimated) as bars on a secondary axis below, and color each quarter's bar green for beat / red for miss so I can read NVDA's beat streak at a glance.
expectedReason: homepage showcase categorical charts need multi-row comparisons
responsePreview:
**NVIDIA (NVDA) — 8-Quarter Earnings Surprise Streak**

The rendered chart shows NVDA’s actual EPS and estimated EPS across the last 8 quarters, with the surprise delta (actual minus estimated) plotted as bars on a secondary axis. **Every bar is green:** NVDA has beaten consensus estimates for 8 consecutive quarters with no misses.

| Quarter | Fiscal End | Reported EPS | Estimated EPS | Surprise | % Surprise |
|:---|:---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Q2 FY2025 | 2024-07-31 | $0.68 | $0.63 | +$0.05 | +7.94% |
| Q3 FY2025 | 2024-10-31 | $0.81 | $0.75 | +$0.06 | +8.00% |
| Q4 FY2025 | 2025-01-31 | $0.89 | $0.85 | +$0.04 | +4.71% |
| Q1 FY2026 | 2025-04-30 | $0.81 | $0.75 | +$0.06 | +8.00% |
| Q2 FY2026 | 2025-07-31 | $1.05 | $1.01 | +$0.04 | +3.96% |
| Q3 FY2026 | 2025-10-31 | $1.30 | $1.26 | +$0.04 | +3.17% |
| Q4 FY2026 | 2026-01-31 | $1.62 | $1.54 | +$0.08 | +5.19% |
| Q1 FY2027 | 2026-04-30 | $1.87 | $1.77 | +$0.10 | +5.65% |

**At a glance:** The beat streak is perfect across all 8 quarters. The EPS base nearly tripled from $0.68 to $1.87, and the absolute surprise widened in the most recent two reports to +$0.08 and +$0.10.
